summary: Iteration 104: Virtual Background Feature - All frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features tested: Background button in bottom controls, BackgroundPicker modal with overlay, None button + 3 blur levels, 3 category tabs with correct image counts (Sacred Sites: 5, Nature: 6, Cosmic: 4), close button and overlay click functionality, useVirtualBackground hook exports, and all existing LiveRoom features preserved.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps chat send button - minor z-index issue (carried over from iteration 102/103)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual background feature fully implemented and tested. Session 7411b23d-167d-435b-858a-a372aa7e3c4f is active. MediaPipe segmentation model loads from CDN and requires WebGL - actual processing won't work in headless mode but all UI elements work correctly. The BackgroundPicker uses createPortal to render on document.body with z-[9999].

background_button.text: Background (or 'BG Active' when background is selected)

existing_features_preserved.host_commands: WORKING - All 8 commands (begin, breathe_in, breathe_out, hold, focus, release, om, end_practice)

background_picker_modal.header: Shows 'Virtual Background' title with Layers icon
background_picker_modal.category_tabs: Sacred Sites, Nature, Cosmic - tabs switch content correctly
background_picker_modal.image_grid: 3-column grid with lazy-loaded images, hover effects, selection indicator
background_picker_modal.footer: Info text: 'Virtual backgrounds use AI-powered body segmentation for a natural look'

bottom_controls_bar.buttons_visible: Cam On, Share Screen, Background, Begin Practice, Breathe In, Breathe Out, Hold, Focus, Release & Let Go, Om, End Practice, Record, End
